message:
fix(tools): re-check contact approval after handshake in batch message send

Harden multi-recipient message delivery by adding post-handshake contact
approval verification. If an agent's approval status changes during the
handshake attempt (e.g., blocked by policy update), the message is now
correctly withheld rather than delivered.

This mirrors the existing single-recipient send_message logic and
prevents blocked agents from receiving messages in batch send scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
